configurations.name: Debug: Load Local ePiE Package
configurations.code: pkgload::load_all('Package', quiet = FALSE); cat('Loaded ePiE from local Package/ source\n')

configurations.name: Debug: Strict Profile Selection
configurations.code: pkgload::load_all('Package', quiet = TRUE); bega <- LoadScenarioConfig('BegaPathogenCrypto', 'Inputs', 'Outputs'); volta <- LoadScenarioConfig('VoltaWetPathogenCrypto', 'Inputs', 'Outputs'); stopifnot(bega$pathogen_profile_policy == 'strict', volta$pathogen_profile_policy == 'strict'); stopifnot(bega$pathogen_profile_set == 'romania_eu_screening', volta$pathogen_profile_set == 'ghana_ssa_screening'); print(data.frame(scenario = c('BegaPathogenCrypto', 'VoltaWetPathogenCrypto'), country = c(bega$study_country, volta$study_country), profile_set = c(bega$pathogen_profile_set, volta$pathogen_profile_set)))

configurations.name: Debug: Bega Crypto Profile Simulation
configurations.code:
pkgload::load_all('Package', quiet = TRUE); cfg <- LoadScenarioConfig('BegaPathogenCrypto', 'Inputs', 'Outputs'); state <- list(input_paths = cfg$input_paths, study_country = cfg$study_country, country_population = cfg$country_population, flow_source = cfg$flow_source, prefer_highres_flow = isTRUE(cfg$prefer_highres_flow), lake_transport_mode = cfg$lake_transport_mode, visualization_variants = 'linear', provenance_label_mode = cfg$provenance_label_mode, pathogen_profile_set = cfg$pathogen_profile_set, pathogen_profile_id = cfg$pathogen_profile_id, pathogen_profile_policy = cfg$pathogen_profile_policy, pathogen_profile_path = cfg$pathogen_profile_path, basin_id = cfg$basin_id, run_output_dir = tempfile(pattern = 'vscode_bega_crypto_'), is_dry_season = isTRUE(cfg$is_dry_season), data_root = cfg$dataDir, points = read.csv(cfg$input_paths$pts, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), hl = read.csv(cfg$input_paths$hl, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)); state$HL_basin <- state$hl; result <- RunSimulationPipeline(state, cfg$target_substance, cpp = FALSE); cat('Profile:', result$pathogen_params$pathogen_profile_set, '
Output:', state$run_output_dir, '
Positive nodes:', sum(result$results$pts$C_w > 0, na.rm = TRUE), '
')

configurations.name: Debug: Volta Wet Crypto Profile Simulation
configurations.code:
pkgload::load_all('Package', quiet = TRUE); cfg <- LoadScenarioConfig('VoltaWetPathogenCrypto', 'Inputs', 'Outputs'); state <- list(input_paths = cfg$input_paths, study_country = cfg$study_country, country_population = cfg$country_population, discharge_gpkg_path = cfg$discharge_gpkg_path, simulation_year = cfg$simulation_year, simulation_months = cfg$simulation_months, discharge_aggregation = cfg$discharge_aggregation, network_source = cfg$network_source, flow_source = cfg$flow_source, prefer_highres_flow = isTRUE(cfg$prefer_highres_flow), lake_transport_mode = cfg$lake_transport_mode, canal_q_source_id = cfg$canal_q_source_id, canal_q_regime = cfg$canal_q_regime, canal_q_source_table = cfg$canal_q_source_table, visualization_variants = 'linear', provenance_label_mode = cfg$provenance_label_mode, pathogen_profile_set = cfg$pathogen_profile_set, pathogen_profile_id = cfg$pathogen_profile_id, pathogen_profile_policy = cfg$pathogen_profile_policy, pathogen_profile_path = cfg$pathogen_profile_path, basin_id = cfg$basin_id, run_output_dir = tempfile(pattern = 'vscode_volta_crypto_'), is_dry_season = isTRUE(cfg$is_dry_season), data_root = cfg$dataDir, points = read.csv(cfg$input_paths$pts, stringsAsFactors = FALSE), hl = read.csv(cfg$input_paths$hl, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)); state$HL_basin <- state$hl; result <- RunSimulationPipeline(state, cfg$target_substance, cpp = FALSE); cat('Profile:', result$pathogen_params$pathogen_profile_set, '
Output:', state$run_output_dir, '
Positive nodes:', sum(result$results$pts$C_w > 0, na.rm = TRUE), '
')
